message:
fix(fleet-launcher): add pre-existence conflict detection for pane entities during fleet launch

LifecycleRegistry::register_entity silently overwrites existing entries,
so fleet_launcher::execute now checks for pre-existing pane entities
before registration. This correctly fails slots when pane identities
are already registered, fixing execute_sequential_halts and
execute_does_not_register_agent_when_pane_registration_fails tests.
All 51 fleet_launcher tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
